title: Dynamical Compass
description: Adds a compass, pointing to a custom position.
body:
## Version 4.X.X  
For older versions of the mod, check the [wiki](https://github.com/GeheimagentNr1/DynamicalCompass/wiki).  

This mod adds only one item, the Dynamical Compass.  
This mod is needed on client and server side.  
Needs the Recipes Library ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/recipes-library) or [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipes-library))!  

---

You need a server to play with friends? You don't know how to set up one? Just rent an already configured server!  

![BisectHosting Promotion Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GeheimagentNr1/Online_Mod_Data/master/images/bisect_hosting_banner.png)  

Click on the picture above, select a plan (with recommended at least 6 GB),  
use my code **[agent](https://bisecthosting.com/agent)** to get **25%** off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!  

---

## Support  
![Supported Versions Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GeheimagentNr1/Online_Mod_Data/master/Supported_Versions.png)  
Minecraft versions, for which the mod is not released, are not supported.  
You can find a text version [here](https://github.com/GeheimagentNr1/Online_Mod_Data/wiki/Supported-Versions).  

## Features  
The Dynamical Compass can be set to a destination position by shift (sneaking) right-clicking on a block.  
It only shows in the direction of the destination position, when you're in the dimension, in which you have set the destination position.  
If you're not in the destination dimension or the compass has no destination set, it spins like the vanilla compass in the nether or the end.  
You can lock the Dynamical Compass with a glass pane, so the destination can not be changed.  
Warning:  
* You can't unlock the Dynamical Compass again.
* Even a Compass without a destination can be locked.

## Recipes  

### Dynamical Compass  
Recipe: Gold Ingots, Lapis Lazuli  
![Dynamical Compass Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBSFWwzw/images/28dc91f7e6b0209ccd6cd1f567fb99da403dea97.png)  

### Lock Dynamical Compass  
Effect: Locks the Dynamical Compass, so the destination can not be changed.  
Recipe: Dynamical Compass, Glass Pane  
Warning: You can't unlock the Dynamical Compass again.  
Even a Compass without a destination can be locked.  
![Lock Dynamical Compass Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBSFWwzw/images/b3d8fefd2f96bad08efe24d9672ae4e66958fb3b.png)  

### Melt Dynamical Compass to a Gold Ingot  
Effect: Melts the Dynamical Compass in a furnace to a Gold Ingot  
Recipe: Dynamical Compass, Burning Material  
![Melt Dynamical Compass to a Gold Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBSFWwzw/images/ed06f6a78b4311353ec2b3592812d50fdb02208c.png)  

### Renaming Dynamical Compass  
Effect: Dynamical Compass gets a custom name  
Recipe: Dynamical Compass, Named Name Tag  
![Renaming Dynamical Compass Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBSFWwzw/images/cb16562d0c5f413c077545f7e07dcc92c06df276.png)  

## Commands  
* `/giveDC <targets> <destination pos> <destination dimension> <locked>`  
targets: Players who shall get the Dynamical Compass.  
destination pos: x and z coordinate of the block on which the compass shall show.  
destination dimension: dimension in which the compass shall show the destination pos.  
locked: Shall the destination be locked or not.

---

Thanks for the texture and the logo to Muse31.  
You can use this mod in non-commercial modpacks without asking.  
You can find more mods from me on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/geheimagentnr1/projects) and [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/GeheimagentNr1).  

![This is a Forge mod only until 1.21.1. This is a NeoForge mod only starting 1.21.1. There will be no Fabric version. It will not be backported.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GeheimagentNr1/Online_Mod_Data/master/images/mod_loader_banner.png)
